TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjuabal, title = Tjuabal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjuabal} }

S.FORM: alang Tjuabal ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 302 buwan, 879 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 861 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjuabal hya' ga Tjuavanaq. tay mkyahu' na Tjuabal hya' ga Dralendren. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuabal ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjuabal ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 302 buwan, 879 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 861 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjuabal hya' ga Tjuavanaq. tay mkyahu' na Tjuabal hya' ga Dralendren. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuabal ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč tjuaő≤al …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu taznin …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%, rukaj *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na tjuaő≤al ńßja Ē …£a tjua*anaq. taj mkjańßu Ē na tjuaő≤al ńßja Ē …£a *ralen*ren. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč tjuaő≤al …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
